title: ajuga glabrifolia
intro: Ajuga glabrifolia, also known as the smooth bugleweed or Himalayan bugle, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ajuga glabrifolia include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Ajuga glabrifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infested oil to make use of its herbal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
